name: player_season_projected_points single year_offset shifts the projection year
description: player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + single year_offset=[1] correlates the projection join on year=2024 (base+1) via the shared emit_year_match primitive, returning the offset-year projection instead of silently returning the base-year value.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, ROUND((COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_attempts", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_completions", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_yards", 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_interceptions", 0) * -1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_touchdowns", 0) * 4 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."rushing_attempts", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."rushing_yards", 0) * 0.1 +
